title: THSI Personal Observation
description: Schema for a personal observation input to the THSI Inference Engine v0.1. observed_node must match a node_id in the static evidence graph.

observation_id.description: Unique identifier for this observation record.

subject_id.description: Identifier for the person to whom the observation applies.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the observation was recorded.

observed_node.description: Graph node_id corresponding to the observed signal or marker.

value.description: Observed value: boolean, number, string, or structured object.

unit.description: Measurement unit when applicable; null otherwise.

quality_score.description: Observation quality weight between 0 and 1; observations with quality_score <= 0 are excluded from inference.

context.description: Structured contextual metadata for conservative interpretation.
